summary: Global Markets page (/global) fully tested. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). The major fixes are verified working: Gold shows real XAUUSD.FOREX price 4,421.42 USD/oz (not GLD ETF ~$407), Silver added at 68.38 USD/oz, Oil labeled 'Petrol (ETF USO)', Gas labeled 'Gaze Nat. (ETF UNG)', ticker bar shows NASDAQ 100 at 23,308 (not old Composite 21,145), Gold chart renders real price history (~$4200-5400 range). One minor pre-existing bug found: FTSE 100 is missing from the heatmap/overview because EODHD returns NA for FTSE.INDX real-time endpoint.

minor.issue: FTSE 100 (FTSE.INDX) missing from response. EODHD returns all-NA values for FTSE.INDX real-time endpoint. DB fallback fails because DB stores FTSE as symbol '^FTSE' (from yfinance era) while the code looks for 'FTSE.INDX'. Backend log confirms: 'WARNING - No valid price for FTSE.INDX'
minor.note: FTSE 100 still appears in TickerBar via /api/stocks/global (reads DB with ^FTSE symbol)

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/global/overview returns 200 with all sections (indices, commodities, crypto, forex, sentiment)
✅ Gold (Aur) price is 4,421.42 USD/oz using XAUUSD.FOREX symbol - real spot price NOT GLD ETF
✅ Gold source is 'eodhd_eod_spot' or 'eodhd_intraday_live' - confirmed EODHD-based
✅ Silver (Argint) present at 68.38 USD/oz using XAGUSD.FOREX symbol
✅ Oil labeled 'Petrol (ETF USO)' - correctly identified as ETF not WTI
✅ Gas labeled 'Gaze Nat. (ETF UNG)' - correctly identified as ETF
✅ NASDAQ 100 in overview at 23,319 (not NASDAQ Composite 21,145)
✅ S&P 500 in expected range ~6421
✅ Overview source is 'EODHD All-in-One (Batch)' - no yfinance
✅ Ticker bar shows NASDAQ 100 at 23,308.67 (correct EODHD data)
✅ GET /api/global/commodities returns Aur, Argint, Petrol (ETF USO), Gaze Nat (ETF UNG) with real prices
✅ GET /api/global/chart/XAUUSD.FOREX returns 31 data points with prices in real gold range ($4421)
✅ GET /api/global/indices returns 7 indices all with EODHD sources
✅ Frontend: Comodități tab shows 4 commodity cards with correct names and prices
✅ Frontend: Gold card displays '4.421,42 USD/oz' with gold medal emoji
✅ Frontend: Silver card displays '68,38 USD/oz'
✅ Frontend: Gold chart modal opens with XAUUSD.FOREX candlestick chart (4200-5400 range)
✅ Frontend: Heatmap shows all assets with color coding
✅ Frontend: Market status indicators for Wall Street, Europa, Asia, Crypto
✅ Frontend: Indices tab shows S&P 500 (~6428), NASDAQ 100 (~23347), Dow Jones, DAX, CAC 40, Nikkei, Hang Seng
✅ Frontend: Ticker bar scrolls continuously with NASDAQ 100, FTSE 100, Hang Seng etc.
✅ Frontend: TradingReminder modal appears on first asset click (by design)
✅ Backend tests: All 24/24 passed in test_global_markets.py
✅ API /api/global/overview commodities source confirms 'eodhd_eod_spot' for Aur and Argint
action_items: OPTIONAL - Fix FTSE 100 missing from heatmap: Either (a) remove FTSE.INDX from GLOBAL_INDICES since EODHD doesn't support it, or (b) store an eodhd_symbol field in stocks_global so the fallback can match by eodhd_symbol='FTSE.INDX' OR use a different FTSE EODHD symbol like FTSE.INDX from historical EOD endpoint instead of real-time
critical_code_review_comments: FTSE.INDX in GLOBAL_INDICES is unreachable - EODHD returns NA for this symbol in real-time endpoint; DB fallback searches for 'FTSE.INDX' but DB stores '^FTSE'. The entry should be removed or handled separately (e.g., via EOD endpoint like gold).

TickerBar /api/stocks/global reads from stocks_global DB (uses ^FTSE symbol) while /api/global/overview uses EODHD symbol FTSE.INDX - the two systems use different symbol formats creating inconsistency for FTSE.

Minor: The update_global_indices() in stock_service.py still has NDXNDX.INDX mapped to '^IXIC' symbol_display (old NASDAQ Composite symbol) - the DB stores NASDAQ 100 as '^IXIC' which could be confusing for analytics queries

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all main features working, FTSE 100 missing from heatmap - minor)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Markets page (/global) is working correctly with real data. Key facts: Gold=4421 USD/oz (XAUUSD.FOREX via EOD endpoint), Silver=68 USD/oz (XAGUSD.FOREX), NASDAQ 100=23308 (EODHD), all via EODHD All-in-One plan. One pre-existing bug: FTSE 100 (FTSE.INDX) returns NA from EODHD real-time endpoint, so it's missing from the heatmap. It still appears in the ticker bar from DB cache with yfinance symbol ^FTSE. Test credentials: GET /api/auth/demo-login?secret=finromania-demo-2026 gives session_token.

rca_of_ftse_issue.root_cause: EODHD real-time API returns NA for FTSE.INDX (UK market, possibly requires different subscription or symbol format). Batch real-time call fails → individual fetch fails → DB fallback looks for symbol='FTSE.INDX' but DB has symbol='^FTSE'. Both paths fail.
rca_of_ftse_issue.reproduction: GET /api/global/overview - 'indices' array has 7 items, no FTSE. GET https://eodhd.com/api/real-time/FTSE.INDX?api_token=...&fmt=json returns all NA values.
rca_of_ftse_issue.mitigation: Option A: Remove FTSE.INDX from GLOBAL_INDICES dict (accept FTSE not available via EODHD). Option B: Fetch FTSE via EOD endpoint (like gold/silver) and store with eodhd_symbol='FTSE.INDX' in DB for proper fallback.
